mission.title: istio: Setting istio sidecar proxy resource request/limit
mission.description: Setting istio sidecar proxy resource request/limit. Requested by 16+ users.

steps.title: Check current istio deployment
steps.description:
Verify your istio version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
helm list -n istio-system 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working istio installation.

steps.title: Review istio configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant istio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio
```
Hello :)

**Describe the feature request**

Is there an option to set istio proxy sidecar request/limits per application (Pod)? For some of our applications we would like to use Guaranteed QoS

steps.title: Apply the fix for Setting istio sidecar proxy resource request/limit
steps.description:
When a limitrange is active, not setting the limits will result
in an error. This patch will allow setting limits for the sidecar
and when not set, use the requests value.

For fixing https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/16126
```yaml
containers:
  - name: istio-proxy
…
    resources:
      limits:
        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU`) -]]
        cpu: "[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU` ]]"
        [[ else -]]
        cpu: 200m
        [[ end ]]
        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory`) -]]
        memory: "[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory` ]]"
        [[ else -]]
        memory: 256Mi
        [[ end ]]
      requests:
        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.is
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Setting istio sidecar proxy resource request/limit" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
When a limitrange is active, not setting the limits will result
in an error. This patch will allow setting limits for the sidecar
and when not set, use the requests value.

For fixing https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/16126
codeSnippets:
containers:
  - name: istio-proxy
…
    resources:
      limits:
        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU`) -]]
        cpu: "[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU` ]]"
        [[ else -]]
        cpu: 200m
        [[ end ]]
        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory`) -]]
        memory: "[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory` ]]"
        [[ else -]]
        memory: 256Mi
        [[ end ]]
      requests:
        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyRequestsCPU`) -]]
        cpu: "[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyRequestsCPU` ]]"
        [[ else -]]
        cpu: 100m
        [[ end ]]
        [[ if (isset .Objec

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
